products.name: Aura Riviera Sunglasses
products.description: Premium UV-protection sunglasses crafted for bright summer days and beach adventures. Designed with lightweight frames and polarized lenses for maximum comfort and clarity. Perfect for protecting your eyes while adding a stylish touch to any outfit.

products.name: Drift Linen Shirt
products.description: A breathable and lightweight linen shirt made for hot summer weather and casual outings. Its soft fabric ensures all-day comfort while maintaining a clean, modern look. Ideal for beach walks, vacations, or everyday summer styling.

products.name: Aura Sun Shield Sunscreen
products.description: High-performance SPF 50 sunscreen designed to provide strong protection against harmful UV rays. Its lightweight and non-greasy formula keeps your skin hydrated and refreshed all day. A must-have for beach days, outdoor activities, and sunny vacations.

products.name: Straw Beach Hat
products.description: A stylish straw beach hat made to combine fashion and sun protection effortlessly. Its wide brim offers excellent shade while keeping you cool under the summer sun. Perfect for beach trips, vacations, or outdoor brunches.

products.name: Sol Beach Tote Bag
products.description: A spacious and durable tote bag designed to carry all your beach essentials with ease. Made with lightweight materials and strong handles for comfort and reliability. Perfect for towels, sunscreen, snacks, and everything you need for a beach day.

products.name: Trendy Flip Flops
products.description: Comfortable and lightweight flip flops made for beach walks and casual summer wear. Designed with cushioned soles for extra comfort and long-lasting support. Easy to slip on and perfect for warm-weather adventures.

products.name: Hydrating Sunscreen SPF 50
products.description: Advanced hydrating sunscreen that combines powerful SPF 50 protection with skin-nourishing ingredients. Keeps your skin moisturized while shielding it from harsh sunlight. Perfect for daily wear, outdoor sports, and long summer trips.

products.name: Bloom Summer Beach Wear Set
products.description: A comfortable and stylish beachwear set designed for vacations, poolside relaxation, and sunny beach days. Made with breathable fabric to keep you cool and comfortable in warm weather. Blends fashion and functionality for the ultimate summer look.

brandCards.tagline: Premium skincare essentials for sunny days
Lightweight summer outfits with breathable comfort
Stylish beach bags and breezy summer hats for your perfect seaside look
Beach-ready accessories for travel and relaxation
